failure.message: Import statements are in the wrong order. 'from cv_bridge import CvBridge' should be before 'import rclpy': from cv_bridge import CvBridge
No blank lines allowed after function docstring: """Return a representative scene color in BGR order."""
line too long (100 > 99 characters): f'LED backend is unavailable, so colors will not be shown on hardware: {init_error}'
line too long (100 > 99 characters): f'LED backend ready using {self.led.driver_name} mode with {self.led.count} pixels.'
line too long (101 > 99 characters): self.init_error = getattr(strip, 'init_error', '') or f'{candidate} backend unavailable.'
